overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas Definitive Edition featuring the character CJ exploring the Santa Maria Beach boardwalk at night. The character transitions from a stone-paved building entrance up to an elevated wooden walkway, pauses to observe the beach and ocean below, then continues along the commercial boardwalk past colorful pennant banners and storefronts under warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachside building entrance with stone pavement

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs to elevated boardwalk
transition from stone pavement to wooden boardwalk at top of stairs

agents.ego_description: walking from stone pavement up concrete stairs toward the elevated boardwalk

entered.detail: salmon-colored commercial building with green trim and closed metal shutters
wide concrete staircase leading up to boardwalk level
tall dual-globe street lamp emitting warm orange light
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character begins on an irregular stone pavement beside a pink stucco building with closed shutters. Under the glow of vintage street lamps, he approaches and ascends a wide concrete staircase, transitioning from ground level to an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden boardwalk with beach view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk past evenly spaced street lamps and palm tree planters

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with weathered texture
low concrete wall separating boardwalk from beach below
multi-story building with vertical neon signage and large windows
large terracotta planters containing palm trees lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Now on the elevated wooden boardwalk, the character walks past a concrete retaining wall that offers glimpses of the beach below. The path is lined with palm tree planters and vintage street lamps, while an art deco hotel building runs along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: boardwalk overlook with beach and ocean view

events.description: character stops walking and turns to look over the retaining wall at the beach
character turns back and resumes walking along the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: stopping at the retaining wall to look down at pedestrians walking along the beach path below

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt walking along the beach path below the boardwalk

entered.detail: curved paved path at beach level with pedestrians walking
dark ocean horizon visible beyond the beach with distant city lights

segments.scene_description: The character pauses at the concrete retaining wall, overlooking the beach scene below. From this vantage point, the ocean stretches into the distance under a dark sky, while pedestrians stroll along the curved beach path and palm trees sway in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boardwalk with colorful pennant banners

events.description: colorful pennant banners appear overhead spanning the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the boardwalk passing other pedestrians and colorful overhead decorations

notable_agents.action: woman in beige sweater and shorts walking past the character

entered.detail: strings of red, yellow, blue and green triangular flags spanning overhead
large illuminated billboard showing a woman on a beach with orange background
multi-story blue building with fire escape and checkerboard trim
yellow sign with red text reading 'SALE ADULT BOOKS VIDEO'

segments.scene_description: Resuming his walk, the character passes under colorful pennant banners strung across the boardwalk. He walks past a large beach-themed advertisement billboard and approaches a storefront with a bright yellow adult bookstore sign, while other pedestrians stroll by in the warm artificial light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet street-level entrance up onto a vibrant, elevated beach boardwalk at night. It begins on irregular stone pavement beside a pink stucco building, moving forward as the character ascends a wide concrete staircase to reach a higher level. As the camera transitions onto the wooden boardwalk, the scene opens up to reveal palm tree planters and an art deco hotel, passing a concrete retaining wall that offers a brief, overlooking view of the dark ocean and pedestrians on the beach below. The movement then resumes, gliding under colorful pennant banners and past a large beach-themed billboard before finally approaching a storefront with a bright yellow sign under the warm glow of artificial street lighting.
